title: strategy_003_us_session_momentum_scalp
author: manual-transcript-drop
summary_bullets: STRATEGY: US Session Momentum Scalp ASSET: BTC, ETH TIMEFRAME: 15m MARKET CONDITION: US market session only (high liquidity, high volume) TYPE: Session momentum scalp CONCEPT: Only trade during US equity market hours (13:30-20:00 UTC / 9:30 AM-4:00 PM ET) when crypto volume and liquidity peak due to institutional and retail trader activity.
Use VWAP as the session anchor — price above VWAP is bullish bias, below is bearish.
Combine with MACD for momentum timing and Stochastic for entry precision.
Close all positions before session end.

SESSION FILTER: - Active hours: 13:30 - 19:30 UTC (close positions by 19:30, market closes 20:00) - No new entries after 18:30 UTC (need at least 1 hour for trade to play out) - Skip weekends (Saturday/Sunday) - Skip US public holidays: New Years Day, MLK Day, Presidents Day, Good Friday, Memorial Day, Juneteenth, Independence Day, Labor Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas - Implementation: check candle timestamp against allowed hours before any entry logic INDICATORS USED: - VWAP (session reset daily)
Current time is within US session hours 2.
Price is above VWAP (bullish session bias) 3.
MACD histogram is positive and increasing (momentum building) 4.
Stochastic K crosses above D from below 30 (pullback entry) 5.
Price is above EMA 9 (immediate short-term trend up) ENTRY SHORT: 1.

extracted_rules: STRATEGY: US Session Momentum Scalp ASSET: BTC, ETH TIMEFRAME: 15m MARKET CONDITION: US market session only (high liquidity, high volume) TYPE: Session momentum scalp CONCEPT: Only trade during US equity market hours (13:30-20:00 UTC / 9:30 AM-4:00 PM ET) when crypto volume and liquidity peak due to institutional and retail trader activity.

Price is below EMA 9 (immediate short-term trend down) EXIT RULES: - Take profit: 1.5x ATR(14) from entry (quick scalp target) - Stop loss: 1.0x ATR(14) from entry (tight stop, 1.5:1 R:R) - Session exit: Close ALL open positions at 19:30 UTC regardless of P&L - VWAP cross exit: If price crosses VWAP against your position, exit immediately - No overnight holds RISK MANAGEMENT: - Risk per trade: 0.5% of account (smaller for scalps, higher frequency) - Max trades per session: 4 (avoid overtrading)
The session-end close eliminates overnight gap risk.
If hl_backtest_engine.py doesn’t currently support session-hour filters, this will need a small addition to check candle timestamps against allowed trading windows before evaluating entry conditions.
